title: Transactions windowed data KPI drift
description: Windowed loading can mislead totals during parity/cutover comparisons
mitigation: Use explicit full-window mode for parity and mark KPI scope

title: historical_reference semantic mismatch
description: Sale-like handling may diverge between frontend and backend implementations
mitigation: Freeze enum semantics and add invariant fixtures

title: buy-price cost-basis drift
description: Cost source resolution item/history/product may not match backend read model
mitigation: Lock cost-basis contract and provenance flags

title: frontend-backend schema drift
description: Contracts and local runtime objects diverge during staggered migration
mitigation: Versioned DTO governance and compatibility checks

title: ProductAnalytics client-side performance
description: Large datasets are aggregated client-side and can stall UI
mitigation: Introduce backend read model planning and bounded queries

title: Sales rounding boundary regression
description: Whole-money settlement boundary may regress if backend logic diverges
mitigation: Keep do-not-break invariant and settlement fixtures

title: backend not yet primary
description: Most modules still rely on Firestore/local runtime creating dual-path risk
mitigation: Incremental page/domain adoption order with rollback flags

title: dual-source inconsistency
description: Firestore and backend datasets may diverge during shadow phase
mitigation: Keep shadow compare and mismatch reason telemetry active

title: procurement backend incompleteness
description: Freight/PurchasePanel flows remain frontend-primary despite backend module scaffold
mitigation: Define procurement API contracts + lifecycle parity plan

title: data migration tooling gap
description: Export/import/validation scripts for full production snapshot are incomplete
mitigation: Prioritize migration script planning and dry-run checks

title: version-update workflow confusion
description: Frontend version prompt may conflict with staged backend rollout windows
mitigation: Include version/update behavior in deployment playbook
